text: Use Claude for PowerPoint | Claude Help Center Use Claude for PowerPoint Claude for PowerPoint is available to Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans. Claude for PowerPoint is an add-in that integrates Claude into your PowerPoint workflow. It's designed for professionals who build presentations, particularly those who spend significant time creating and refining slide decks. With Claude for PowerPoint, you can: Build new slides using your existing client or corporate templates Build new slides using your existing client or corporate templates Make pinpoint edits to specific slides without regenerating entire decks Make pinpoint edits to specific slides without regenerating entire decks Generate full deck structures from natural language descriptions Generate full deck structures from natural language descriptions Convert bullets into professional diagrams and native PowerPoint charts Convert bullets into professional diagrams and native PowerPoint charts Use connectors to bring context from your other tools directly into your slides Use connectors to bring context from your other tools directly into your slides Iterate on feedback quickly while preserving formatting and template compliance Iterate on feedback quickly while preserving formatting and template compliance Get started with Claude for PowerPoint Supported versions PowerPoint on the web PowerPoint on the web PowerPoint on Windows (Microsoft 365 subscription, build 16.0.13127.20296+) PowerPoint on Windows (Microsoft 365 subscription, build 16.0.13127.20296+) PowerPoint on Mac (version 16.46+) PowerPoint on Mac (version 16.46+) For individuals Navigate to the Claude for PowerPoint listing on Microsoft Marketplace . Navigate to the Claude for PowerPoint listing on Microsoft Marketplace . Click "Get it now" to install the add-in. Click "Get it now" to install the add-in. Open PowerPoint, activate the add-in, and sign in with your Claude account. Open PowerPoint, activate the add-in, and sign in with your Claude account. For admins Deploy Claude for PowerPoint to your organization: Visit the Microsoft 365 Admin Center . Visit the Microsoft 365 Admin Center . Navigate to Settings > Org Settings > User owned apps and services and ensure that “Let users access the Office Store" is toggled on. Navigate to Settings > Org Settings > User owned apps and services and ensure that “Let users access the Office Store" is toggled on. Navigate to Settings > Integrated apps > Add-ins . Navigate to Settings > Integrated apps > Add-ins . Search for "Claude by Anthropic in PowerPoint" in Microsoft AppSource. Search for "Claude by Anthropic in PowerPoint" in Microsoft AppSource.
